title: Valkyrien Sails Rope Compat
description: A data pack that adds compatibility between the following mods: VS Sails, Farmer's Delight, and Supplementaries ropes
body:
This data pack fixes the crafting incompatibility between VS Sails, Farmer's Delight, and Supplementaries. Previously, ropes from these mods were separate and could not be used in each other's recipes. Now, all ropes are unified! You can use VS Sails ropes in Farmer's Delight recipes and vice versa, creating a fully integrated and consistent crafting experience. No more recipe conflicts or frustration in your survival world!

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LtKvNwmL/images/2ffbfc85d2a70a5d012b12c25184fb98ece0b1fe.png)
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LtKvNwmL/images/e4f68bd23dbc0cc944b545c0f8a2a203ef9d5420.png)

**You can freely use this data pack in your modpack, just give credit**
